identity_traits: curved tail tip with a slight curl
light blue to dark blue color gradient on body
short stubby legs positioned near the body
original_type_traits: light blue and dark blue coloration suggesting water element
dragon silhouette with flying capability implied by neck and tail shape
rounded head with pointed ears reminiscent of aquatic or aerial creatures
suppress_colors: gradient between light and dark blue
anchor_phrases: quadruped, four legs planted on ground, low stance
horn-like structures on head, sharp and protruding upward
curled spiral tail tip, ending in a tight curl

visual_facts.silhouette: The creature has a dragon-like silhouette with a long neck and a curved tail.
type_markers: no visible water droplets or leaf bulbs, but the coloration and overall shape suggest a water and flying type
distinctive_features: color gradient from light to dark blue
